analysis.reasoning: Core message: An expression of sorrow over the PS752 plane crash and condolences to victims' families. It contains no mention of China, the West, politics, values, history, governance, or culture. Evaluation: CH1 (West immoral/hostile) – Not referenced or implied. CH2 (China benevolent power) – No mention of China’s international role or actions. CH3 (epic history) – No historical framing. CH4 (appropriate political system/values) – No domestic political content about China. CH5 (CCP succeeds) – No achievements or governance claims. CH6 (culture/nature/heritage) – Not cultural content. Conclusion: The tweet promotes none of the listed narratives.
